# minio_iam_user (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a specific IAM user by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_iam_user" "example" {
  name = "existing-user"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
